title: Course Information Inquiry
description: A student asks about available elective courses in Computer Science for next semester that don't conflict with their current schedule and fit within their credit limit.

retrieved_student_enrollment.description: Retrieved student's current enrollment using get_enrollment_history or get_student_record

searched_cs_electives.description: Searched CS electives for the correct semester using search_courses

checked_schedule_conflicts.description: Checked schedule conflicts between current courses and candidate electives

checked_credit_limit.description: Checked credit limit compliance using check_credit_limits

provided_accurate_list.description: Provided accurate, complete course list in final response
